title: peristylus forrestii
intro: Peristylus forrestii is an orchid species native to the Himalayan regions of India, Nepal, and Bhutan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of Peristylus forrestii often involve drying the roots and leaves to make teas or infusions that can be used to treat various ailments.
